name: Carla's Lemon Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt together.
2. In a large bowl of electric mixer, beat the margarine, sugar, and egg on medium speed until light and fluffy. Mix in the sour cream, lemon extract, and grated lemon peel on low speed until smooth.
3. Gradually add the sifted flour mixture to the dough, beating until well combined. Form the dough into a ball, wrap it in foil, and refrigerate overnight.
4. Divide the dough into four parts. Refrigerate each part until ready to roll out. On a floured surface, roll each part of dough 1/4-inch thick. Use a 2- to 3-inch cookie cutter or glass to cut out cookies. Place them on a lightly greased cookie sheet about 2 inches apart.
5. Brush the cookies with lemon juice and sprinkle with additional sugar for decoration.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 10-12 minutes until golden brown. Do not overcook. Remove cookies to a wire rack to cool completely. Repeat baking process using one part of cookie dough at a time, greasing the pan each time.
Yield: about 5-6 dozen cookies.
